description: CompositionBrown formal trousers made of 64% polyester, 34% viscose and 2% lycra, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, brand badge at the side of the right pocket, loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, and a zipper and button closureFittingRegularWash careDry clean and steam ironCrafted from a polyester-viscose-lycra blend fabric, this pair of chinos from the arrow Premium collection is comfortable. Engineered with moisture management qualities, this trouser offers a comfortable and dry Fit, while its stain repelling properties makes it an easy to maintain garment. The lycra blend allows for comfortable stretch and the autofit adjustability of the waistband offers an easy fit and a flattering silhouette, making this a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 41.5"Height: 6.1 Waist: 31"
